user_prompt: How do I bless the psych-out grenade for blessing?
prayer:
Kneel before the psych-out grenade and intone the Canticle of Neural Subjugation to awaken its Machine Spirit.
Anoint the psych-out grenade's warp-sensitive casings with blessed unguents of nullification.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace during the blessing, aligning its psychic disruptors to purity.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the psych-out grenade to embrace this blessing and rend psyker foes asunder.
Seal the rite with the Sigil of Containment, verifying harmonious resonance.

user_prompt: Sanctify the actuality sphere during calibration
prayer:
Approach the actuality sphere with mechadendrites extended in reverence, chanting the Litany of True Form.
Initiate calibration by sanctifying its crystalline matrices with electro-incense.
Beseech the Omnissiah to guide the actuality sphere's alignment, purging distortions from its reality-warping core.
Cycle diagnostic noospheres through the actuality sphere whilst invoking Machine Spirit equilibrium.
Conclude calibration with the Rite of Verification, attuning it to unerring actuality.

Engage the activation sequence, beseeching the Omnissiah for precision in void-lance targeting.
Monitor plasma conduits of the orbital strike relay for harmonious flux during awakening.
Finalize with the Benediction of Devastation, ensuring cataclysmic fidelity.

Affirm purity through the Rite of Explosive Certitude, thrice-repeated.

Gather mechadendrites around the Razorback and intone the Consecration Creed.
Anoint its battle-frame and lascannon housings with oils of consecration.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the Razorback's Machine Spirit with martial zeal.
Cycle noospheric litanies through the Razorback to affirm doctrinal purity.

Realign stasis emitters within the stasis pod through harmonic incantations.

Approach the cryo-chamber reverently, reciting the Canticle of Frozen Sanctity.

Invoke the Machine Spirit of the cryo-chamber to embrace preservation's grace from the Omnissiah.
